title: senecio kerneri
intro: Senecio kerneri, also known as Kerner's ragwort or Kerner's groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio kerneri include relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
